{
  "cwd": "/Users/sam.zhang/Documents/codex-supervisor",
  "execution_layer_policy": {
    "agentic_lead_policy": {
      "min_subagents": 3,
      "policy": "off",
      "required_evidence_grade": "self_reported",

    },

    "supervision_layer": "codex_plus_lead"
  },
  "expected_decisions": [],
  "expected_objections": [],
  "expected_specialists": [],
  "gate": "outcome_review",
  "injected_lesson_block": "Known failure modes to verify before claiming\nThese are advisory lessons from previous supervisor runs. They do not satisfy any gate by themselves.\nUse them as a checklist only: do not block, revise, deny, or accept solely because a lesson exists. A step-repetition lesson applies only when current evidence proves the same handoff, artifacts, and source state are being repeated.\n1. [deliverable_evidence_failed] unknown (source_run_id=vela2-prod-confidence-001): Verify this known failure mode explicitly before claiming the gate is complete.\n2. [missing_worker_signal] worker_invocation (source_run_id=cffe55b8-47b9-4cc0-b025-586aeb0ee5e9): Verify this known failure mode explicitly before claiming the gate is complete.\n3. [FM-2.4] Information withholding (source_run_id=8ebdbc89-0185-4962-be6f-b0f593887670): Address independent reviewer objections with concrete evidence references.\n4. [FM-1.3] Step repetition (source_run_id=8ebdbc89-0185-4962-be6f-b0f593887670): Change the plan or evidence before retrying; do not repeat the same handoff.\n5. [FM-2.4] Information withholding (source_run_id=f89bc699-1b4e-4713-95b7-d1493a3acfd8): Address independent reviewer objections with concrete evidence references.",
  "injected_lesson_block_sha256": "829d220b66bab5c228dc13757a33b6417eba638735b26fcdd3b6bfd95aa9e2c7",
  "injected_lesson_ids": [
    "lesson-59913963cdfc567d8fe610e82aee863ebb77307f753f7046210498c8c522c5e7",
    "lesson-6e3b08262245b3eade5743e9ddb1a92bfb42a34ec49e8b4f2b0792ca1834a590",
    "lesson-833931ec30fbdcacaef5c7df91fae73a71b7ac537110ccf9cab2ec2e80ec6a52",
    "lesson-cd61385380aa0d71d9927ec5c8f719f315a9191aaf387fdc93862d0a6d71f1ef",
    "lesson-715f39df8c3dc22bea09092f80685d87f086d8cdbbf58a0ec008ce0e27d1cb38"
  ],
  "instruction": "Supervisor-owned workflow gate: outcome_review.\n\nIntent:\nValidate and gate the completed Slice 2 implementation: unify produced-baseline semantics across local and SWE-bench mergeability paths. The implementation is already in the worktree; do not broaden scope or create policy proposals. Verify that SWE-bench bridge/replay/live no longer synthesize baseline acceptance from missing, boolean, or self-report-only evidence; valid produced receipts remain available; report-only invariants remain false. For runtime evidence, use nodeid-scoped tests only, not whole long-running test files.\n\nReview this gate against the current source artifacts and return a typed dual_agent_outcome.\nUse decisions/objections to say whether the gate should accept, revise, or deny.\n\nRuntime TDD test contract:\nThe supervisor runtime floor will verify that every TDD-named test below appears in supervisor-generated runtime evidence. Include tests/commands covering all of them in outcome.tests. Explicitly skipped tests must carry a recorded pytest skip reason; silently absent tests block the gate.\nUse only canonical gate decisions (`accept`, `revise`, or `deny`). Do not return `accept_with_residual`; if test execution needs verification, declare the exact pytest commands/nodeids and let the supervisor runtime floor rerun them.\nIf the Claude Bash/test tool is unavailable but the implementation diff is complete, do not block solely on that local tooling outage. Return `accept` with test_status=`unknown`, list the exact pytest commands/nodeids, and make no tests-passed claim; the supervisor runtime floor is the authority and will block the gate on failing or missing tests.\n- test_fixture_runner_missing_produced_baseline_receipt_is_unavailable\n- test_fixture_runner_produced_baseline_receipt_populates_baseline_arm\n- test_bridge_legacy_bool_baseline_row_is_unavailable\n- test_live_runner_without_baseline_decision_receipts_does_not_synthesize_accept\n\nKnown failure modes to verify before claiming\nThese are advisory lessons from previous supervisor runs. They do not satisfy any gate by themselves.\nUse them as a checklist only: do not block, revise, deny, or accept solely because a lesson exists. A step-repetition lesson applies only when current evidence proves the same handoff, artifacts, and source state are being repeated.\n1. [deliverable_evidence_failed] unknown (source_run_id=vela2-prod-confidence-001): Verify this known failure mode explicitly before claiming the gate is complete.\n2. [missing_worker_signal] worker_invocation (source_run_id=cffe55b8-47b9-4cc0-b025-586aeb0ee5e9): Verify this known failure mode explicitly before claiming the gate is complete.\n3. [FM-2.4] Information withholding (source_run_id=8ebdbc89-0185-4962-be6f-b0f593887670): Address independent reviewer objections with concrete evidence references.\n4. [FM-1.3] Step repetition (source_run_id=8ebdbc89-0185-4962-be6f-b0f593887670): Change the plan or evidence before retrying; do not repeat the same handoff.\n5. [FM-2.4] Information withholding (source_run_id=f89bc699-1b4e-4713-95b7-d1493a3acfd8): Address independent reviewer objections with concrete evidence references.",
  "lead_skill": null,
  "outcome_validation_policy": {
    "fidelity_failure": "abort_to_operator",
    "malformed_outcome": "retry_once_with_corrective_packet",
    "subprocess_failure": "abort_to_operator",
    "timeout": "abort_to_operator"
  },
  "packet_schema_version": "dual-agent-handoff/v1",

same gate and handoff packet observed twice
Cursor or reviewer disagreement probe fails
Claude response does not address a prior Codex objection
outcome fidelity or message protocol failure
accepted gate is missing a required probe
